steps.t: Huorns and prowlers dwell in Glâd Ereg in Eregion. Helchuan prowls near the springs north of Zigilgund in Forochel. Dardúr wishes you to bring him vin…
Barghests can be found in Angmar. Brimstone-leeches can be found in Angmar. Dardúr now requires barghest paws and drops of brimstone-leech ichor.
Lagmâs dwells at Urugarth and Târlug may be found at Carn Dûm in Angmar. Dardúr now needs a Badge of Command and an ashen Gorthorog-horn to complete y…
